## Summary
What does this PR change? (1–3 sentences)

## Type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New module/interface scaffolding
- [ ] Model implementation (must include assumptions + units + evidence tag)
- [ ] Verification / golden case
- [ ] Telemetry / proof tooling

## Evidence level
Target evidence level:
- [ ] E0
- [ ] E1
- [ ] E2
- [ ] E3
- [ ] E4
- [ ] E5

## Checklist (required)
- [ ] README not modified (unless explicitly approved)
- [ ] `CLAIMS_POLICY.md` complied with (no reactionless / exotic-matter dependency claims)
- [ ] Units and assumptions are explicit
- [ ] Updated `docs/architecture/ARCH_MAP.md` if architecture changed
- [ ] Updated Decision Log if scope/mission assumptions changed
- [ ] Added/updated verification cases if outputs/behavior changed
- [ ] Telemetry updated if new signals/events are introduced

## Notes / Risks
Anything that could break downstream usage or invalidate prior results.
